\tzpentry{ID4162}{Inst Critical Eff Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4162 introduces Inst Critical Eff Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \frac{S_{inst}}{\hbar} \sim 1 \quad \Rightarrow \quad d_{critical} \approx \left(\frac{\hbar^2}{2m_{eff}\mu_0\mu^2}\right)^{1/5} $$
